notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón grounds into a force out, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez. Michael Harris II out at 2nd. Mauricio Dubón advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Adrian Houser, assist to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert lines out to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski.

notableEvents.label: Michael Harris II reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Adrian Houser, assist to first baseman Rafael Devers.
